name: Dero Duo Rack
tagline: Best commercial-grade bike rack for home garages
description: Dero Duo Rack brings commercial-grade bike parking to your home garage — heavy-duty steel construction that securely holds two bikes.
longDescription: Dero is the leading brand in commercial bike parking, found at offices, universities, and transit stations worldwide. The Duo Rack brings that same commercial-grade quality to your home garage. Made from heavy-gauge steel with a durable powder-coated finish, it mounts securely to wall studs and holds up to 2 bikes (200 lbs total). The patented design cradles bikes by the wheels, preventing frame scratches and keeping bikes stable. Installation is straightforward with the included mounting template and hardware.

keyFeatures.name: Wheel Cradle Design
keyFeatures.description: Holds bikes by the wheels instead of the frame, preventing scratches and accommodating any frame shape or size.

verdict: The Dero Duo Rack is the best home bike storage solution for those who want commercial-grade quality. The wheel-cradle design protects your bike frames, and the steel construction will outlast your garage.

faqs.question: Can Dero Duo Rack hold e-bikes?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Duo Rack supports up to 200 lbs total (100 lbs per bike), which accommodates most e-bikes. Ensure your wall studs can support the combined weight of the rack and bikes.

faqs.question: How difficult is installation?
faqs.answer: Installation requires drilling into wall studs with the included template and hardware. Most users complete it in 30-45 minutes. Two people are recommended due to the rack's 28 lb weight.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has tested hundreds of home and outdoor products across 7 years.
